review_title: Huge savings of money and time
description: Overall experience has been phenomenal. Extremely happy to have found these guys. We will be pulling our marketing in house which will save us $5,000 per year (minimum) and allow us to build more value in our digital real estate. This is the perfect platform for any digital agency or business that has a person on staff that a) enjoys marketing, b) is able to commit an hour a week to digital marketing, c) wants to build value in there business by taking more control over there online reputation.
author: Ronny B.
pros: Functionality Customer service Price Ability to customize the experience
cons: That I didn't know about it sooner! Not much to dislike, if I had to answer it's not as "shiny and pretty" as some others, but I don't care about that, just need it to do the job!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall our experience with Rannko has been more than satisfactory. I recommend it to other business owners and anyone else managing business reviews regularly.
author: Matt N.
pros: It manages multi location businesses very well. I’m able to see an overview of all my reviews and overall scores easily. It automates most of the response tasks so I’m not constantly having to be on top of it.
cons: Nothing really bad to say here. They could sharpen up their navigation a little bit though.

review_title: Rannko is the real deal! Finally an all-in-one digital marketing and reputation management suite!
description: I was able to immediately gain positive reviews, as well as stay on top of any communication from partners and/or clients to ensure that nothing is missed from our end.
author: Richard H.
pros: Ease of use, set up and operation of the software is second to none. Simplicity is king! This platform is a combination of the various tools I have used in the past to enhance our digital presence and ensure we always remain engaged.
cons: Just looking forward to the ability to post simultaneously to IG account from meerkat social so that all social media can be scheduled ahead of time and executed in one swoop.

review_title: One of the best investments we have made! It has helped grow our business tremendously!
author: Karen P.
pros: Really easy to use. Makes managing my business reputation and social media easier than having to manually go to everything myself!
cons: So far, we haven't found any concerns that they haven't been able to deliver on. Incredibly, they added and changed a couple of things that we thought the site needed, from a business perspective. What company does that! Amazing!

description: This software enables our agency and our clients to manage multiple social media accounts extremely easily, make sure all of our local listings are all consistent, see and respond to every review that comes in, and it even gives us weekly SEO reports. It's a great tool for our agency to use to help manage our clients' marketing channels.
author: Dennis K.
pros: We LOVE this software because it's so easy to use and they're always adding new features and making it better. It does everything our clients need. Plus it's extremely affordable. Solid product and great support team.
cons: I can't think of anything it can't do or that we aren't thrilled with. Their support team is on top of everything and they're great about fixing bugs really quickly.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very comprehensive, addresses all the issues with review management. The Power Listings module is quite powerful and a far better value than YEXT!
cons: Need more review platforms added. Also a couple of notification features.

review_title: Best Review Managment Platform, Social Media Posting and Power Listing Tool
description: Very nice team and if i needed more answers i had always help. Saving time to have one tool for the Review management.
author: Jer J.
pros: The free on boarding and no contract is really something rare and cool. The Tool/Platform is very helpful as it covers the social media posting and review management tool. On top of that there are power listings so across a lot of platforms you can change at one unique place and it changes in all others. To be able to generate automatic response to the reviews is very useful
cons: nothing that comes in my mind that really is important.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Would defiantly recommend Rannko the customer service alone is second to none
author: Hayden B.
pros: It's much more than reputation management & their pricing is the most affordable compared to the big named agencies.
cons: It can be confusing to set up new accounts but they're updating it to make things simple.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Sadly, in todays' business climate, it is necessary to be able to challenge bad reviews of our business. Rannko software can handle those challenges adequately. They can help keep the good reputation of our business intact.
author: Jim C.
pros: The software is easy to use and, hands down, is the best value available for our money.
cons: It was not available sooner. There are very few downsides to the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Rannko has good, honest, hard working people at its core, which means as a customer they have your best interest at heart.
author: Elliot P.
pros: Easy to use, manageable and well-thought out.
cons: Not applicable. rannko is fast and streamline
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
